description: One who cultivates land and grows food; a person who works with earth to sustain life. 'Telo' names who feeds us—hands in soil, eyes on seasons.
sound_symbolism: The word tends with earth. 'Te' touches with working contact, soil handled. 'Lo' opens with growing space, crops emerging.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'telo lo thinoe thophe.' (The farmer sows seeds.) Works with 'muila' (earth) through 'sorila' (cultivate) and 'muraki' (harvest). Related to 'nunoa' (forager) as cultivator to gatherer.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Farmer as regenerator—growing food while healing land.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Farmer as season-reader—knowing when to plant, tend, and harvest.
